title: website
text:
BatchMonitor 

BatchMonitor is a package that provides tools for linear optimization problems, specifically for bulk purchasing. It determines optimal lot combinations, solves dual problems for profit maximization, and analyzes price variation impacts.  Beside the function to solve primal and dual problem, the package also provides an lite interface, made with streamlit, to enter and visualize the results.

Churn Prediction for a Telecom Company

This project aims to predict the churn of a iranian telecom company’s customers. The data was on kaggle and contains information about the customers, their contracts, and their usage. The project was divided into 3 parts: data exploration, model building, and model evaluation. You can find it here
